sentences.arabic: غَسْلُ الْيَدَيْنِ بِالْمَاءِ وَالصَّابُونِ يَحْمِينَا مِنَ الْجَرَاثِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Pranje ruku sapunom i vodom štiti nas od klica.
sentences.translationEn: Washing hands with soap and water protects us from germs.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ نُنَظِّفَ أَسْنَانَنَا مَرَّتَيْنِ فِي الْيَوْمِ لِلْحِفَاظِ عَلَى صِحَّتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Zube trebamo prati dva puta dnevno kako bismo očuvali njihovo zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: We should clean our teeth twice a day to maintain their health.

sentences.arabic: النَّظَافَةُ الشَّخْصِيَّةُ طَرِيقَةٌ بَسِيطَةٌ لِلْوِقَايَةِ مِنْ عِدَّةِ أَمْرَاضٍ.
sentences.translation: Lična higijena je jednostavan način za prevenciju mnogih bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: Personal hygiene is a simple way to prevent many infections.
